title: Parallax Background Challenge

statement.markdown:
heading: ## Parallax Background
requirements
1. Create a parallax background effect with multiple images scrolling at different speeds.
2. The images should be horizontally aligned and centered in the container.
3. The parallax effect should be noticeable when the user scrolls the page.
4. The images should have a smooth transition when scrolling.
5. The code should be well-structured, readable, and maintainable.

constraints: The background images should be at least 3 different images.
The container should have a maximum height of 300px.
The code should not exceed 500 lines.
